description:
USB Charging Electric Heated Scarf 3 Gears Adjustable Electric Heating Neck Wrap Fleece Washable Electric Neck Warmer for Winter
Feature:
1. Three-gear temperature control: With a temperature regulating switch, it can be adjusted according to different weather temperatures; Long press the switch button on the scarf for 3 seconds to start the machine until the red light is on; Similarly, press and hold until it is off to turn it off; Short press the key of the scarf to adjust the temperature (green: low temperature/blue: medium temperature/red: high temperature).
2. Easy to use: 5V 2A power can be directly plugged into scarves and other clothes for heating, such as computers, power adapters, or power banks (not included).
3. Skin-friendly and comfortable: Selected comfortable fabrics, high-quality mink fleece, delicate feel, warm and breathable, skin-friendly comfort. Very fashionable. It is waterproof to a certain extent, evenly heated, and can be washed, but do not soak in water for a long time (stick the cloth together, and long-term immersion will affect the adhesion).
4. Not afraid of washing: It can be washed directly, which is cleaner and easier. No need to disassemble, just like ordinary scarves, it can be easily cleaned by adding clean water.
5. Light and portable: It is convenient to carry in winter camping or other activities. It also applies to people who are afraid of cold, so that they no longer worry about winter.

Specification:
Department Name: Adult
Pattern Type: Solid
Style: Fashion
Scarves Type: Scarf
Model Number: Heated Scarf
Place Of Origin: China (Mainland)
Applicable Season: Winter
Applicable Scene: Outdoor
Feature: Keep warm
Material: Fleece + cotton + acrylic
Color: Black, grey, navy blue, pink, red, beige, light grey, dark grey (optional)
Charging mode: USB connection power to charge
Single control: 1 key and 3 gear temperature regulation
Rated voltage: 5V
Rated power: 8W
Temperature setting: 42 ° C/48 ° C/55 ° C
Net weight: 110g
Size: 80x10cm/31.5x3.94in

Operating instructions:
Unfold the scarf, take out the USB cable in the back pocket, and connect the USB interface to the mobile power supply. (Note that the plug should be fully inserted when checking!).
If the mobile power supply is powered, it will light up. If there is no response, you can charge the mobile power supply first.

Instructions for three-gear temperature control:
1. This style has a temperature-regulating switch, which can be adjusted according to different weather temperatures.
2. Long press the switch button on the scarf for 3 seconds to start the machine until the red light is on; In the same way, press and hold until it turns off to turn it off.
3. Short press the key of the scarf to adjust the temperature (green: low temperature/blue: medium temperature/red: high temperature)


Note: The Power bank is not included.
